description:
Windows port of Easydict - Dictionary and translation app

Windows port of Easydict translation app. Supports 15+ translation services (Google, DeepL, OpenAI, Gemini, etc.), global hotkeys, multiple window modes, clipboard monitoring, and LLM streaming. Self-contained application with system tray support.
What's Changed (v0.7.0 -> v0.7.1)
Features
- feat(mini-window): focus results after lookup so PageUp/PageDown scrolls (#138)
Bug Fixes
- fix: demote no-result rows in Mini/Fixed windows, matching Main (#139)
- fix: demote no-result service rows instead of leaving empty headers (#134)
Thanks to Contributors
- @Asura7170 — UI/UX Enhancements: Sticky Headers, Action Buttons, TTS and OCR Automation (#135)
